ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of the component */,
  "manufacturer" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer of the component */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Part number of the component */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the component specification */,
  "operating_temperature_min" REAL /* Minimum operating temperature */,
  "operating_temperature_max" REAL /* Maximum operating temperature */,
  "operating_humidity_min" REAL /* Minimum operating humidity */,
  "operating_humidity_max" REAL /* Maximum operating humidity */,
  "storage_temperature_min" REAL /* Minimum storage temperature */,
  "storage_temperature_max" REAL /* Maximum storage temperature */,
  "storage_humidity_min" REAL /* Minimum storage humidity */,
  "storage_humidity_max" REAL /* Maximum storage humidity */,
  "datasheet_url" TEXT /* URL to the component's datasheet */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the component was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the component was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES component_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_manufacturer FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the component type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component type */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the component type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the component type was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the component type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the parameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the unit of measurement */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the parameter */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the parameter */,
  "typical_value" REAL /* Typical value of the parameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the parameter was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the parameter was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each value */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter the value belongs to */,
  "value_type" TEXT /* Type of the value (e.g., Minimum, Typical, Maximum) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the parameter */,
  "conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the value is applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_values_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the manufacturer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the manufacturer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the manufacturer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the manufacturer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the manufacturer was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the manufacturer was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the product was released */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer of the product */,
  "product_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the product */,
  "product_line_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product line */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_components" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the component used in the product */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the component usage in the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the relationship was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_components_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_components_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, quality assurance, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON array of permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log entry (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_logs_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_compatibility" (
  "compatibility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compatibility entry */,
  "component_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first component */,
  "component_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second component */,
  "compatibility_status" TEXT /* Status of compatibility (e.g., Compatible, Not Compatible) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the compatibility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compatibility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_compatibility_component_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("component_id_2") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_compatibility_component_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("component_id_1") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency entry */,
  "component_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the component that depends on another component */,
  "component_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the component being depended on */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of dependency (e.g., Required, Optional) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the dependency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_dependencies_component_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("component_id_2") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_dependencies_component_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("component_id_1") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the component */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "change_log" TEXT /* Log of changes made in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_versions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., datasheet, user manual) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "document_version" TEXT /* Version of the document */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the document was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the document was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_documents_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the component */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the component was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_access_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
